sub_modules.aes128_key_expand: Combinational AES-128 round-key expansion for one round using RotWord, SubWord, and Rcon.
sub_modules.aes128_round: Combinational standard AES round: SubBytes, ShiftRows, MixColumns, and AddRoundKey.
sub_modules.aes128_final_round: Combinational final AES round: SubBytes, ShiftRows, and AddRoundKey without MixColumns.
sub_modules.aes128_subbytes_shiftrows: Combinational byte substitution and AES row rotation transform.
